prompt: A beautiful sunny garden scene as a TALL PORTRAIT background for a children's educational app. Bright cheerful morning sky with a soft gradient from warm cream light near the horizon to clear blue at the top, a few soft fluffy clouds, a warm glowing sun in the upper-left corner casting gentle light. Rolling green grassy hills in the mid-ground dotted with tiny colorful wildflowers, distant hills lighter and hazy for depth. In the FOREGROUND a freshly prepared dark brown soil garden bed, empty and ready to plant, framed by a low friendly wooden fence at the sides. Keep the CENTER of the image calm and uncluttered so a character and a plant can be placed there later. Modern soft 3D cartoon illustration for a kids app, rounded shapes, smooth gradients, soft global illumination, gentle warm light, cute and friendly, high quality painterly clean render, no harsh outlines. NO text, NO letters, NO numbers, NO words.

An adorable little SPROUT mascot character named Broto for a children's app: a round soft green seedling creature with a smooth rounded bean-sprout body, two tiny leaf-shaped arms, a single curved young sprout-leaf growing on top of its head, big sparkly friendly eyes with highlights, rosy round cheeks, a warm happy gentle smile. Standing upright, front view, WHOLE BODY centered. Solid pure white background #FFFFFF for easy cutout, no ground shadow. Modern soft 3D cartoon character render, rounded shapes, smooth gradients, soft lighting, gentle rim light, cute and friendly, high quality, no harsh outlines. NO text, NO letters, NO numbers.
